nasb.text: A righteous man has regard for the life of his animal, But even the compassion of the wicked is cruel.

esv.text: Whoever is righteous has regard for the life of his beast, but the mercy of the wicked is cruel.

cnv.text: 義人連自己牲畜的性命也顧惜； 但惡人的憐憫也是殘忍。

ccb.text: 义人顾惜自己的牲畜， 恶人的怜悯也是残忍。

csbs.text: 义人顾惜自己牲畜的性命， 恶人的怜悯也是残忍。
